titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Bicentennial Committee, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 08:56

did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, minutes, and reports documenting the activities of Yale's Bicentennial Committee. Included are materials of the Executive Committee, the Art and Decoration Committee, the Entertainment Committee, the Committee on Honorary Degrees, and the Committee on Guests.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 6 (YRG 6), Records of Yale Committees.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Bicentennial Committee, Yale University, Records (RU 155). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, memoranda, minutes, and reports documenting the activities of Yale's Bicentennial Committee. Included are materials of the Executive Committee, the Art and Decoration Committee, the Entertainment Committee, the Committee on Honorary Degrees, and the Committee on Guests.

did.unittitle: Sub-Committee on Entertainment: Information on Accommodations, Tickets, Forms, Registration Cards
Subcommittee on Celebration of the Bicentennial Minutes
Other Schools Receiving Invitations to Celebration
"Greek Festival Hymn" for the bicentennial of the founding of Yale College
"Greek Festival Hymn" for the bicentennial of the founding of Yale College
Notebooks containing the official invitations list to the Yale Bicentennial
Notebooks containing the official invitations list to the Yale Bicentennial
